description: Framework manifest: path-level authority for autonomous agents. Adopters map partitions to their repo layout; CI and scripts read `reference_example` for the optional runnable demo.

backend.description: Go backend: Gin routes (api/), entry point (cmd/), business logic (internal/), shared models (pkg/). Source of truth for behavior.

frontend.description: Nuxt 3 + @nuxt/ui v3 frontend. Consumes the API contract. Primary UI going forward.

frontend_legacy.description: Legacy Vite + TypeScript frontend. Read-only reference for API coverage; being replaced by web/nuxt-ui/.

contract.description: OpenAPI 3 spec (api_spec/openapi.yaml). Source of truth for the API surface shared between backend and frontend.
